text: 战斗中，§Ø_∆.µΩ用尽了最后的力气。
column4: #texten:In the battle, §Ø_∆.µΩ spent the very last reserves of strength.

column6: #texten:_99[k]r... on the left... use that encoding...
#texten:It's fine... I can still help you...

text: 『你们的技术并不成熟。你们的文明离我们还很远。』
tags: #texten:'Your technology is not mature. Your civilization is still far from ours.'

text: 『§Ø_∆.µΩ为你留下了路。你为§Ø_∆.µΩ穿过了黑暗。』
tags: #texten:'§Ø_∆.µΩ left you the path. You crossed the darkness for §Ø_∆.µΩ.'

text: 『这是任何文明中最珍贵的东西。』
tags: #texten:'That is the most precious thing in any civilization.'

text: 『带走吧。这些遗产是你们的了。』
tags: #texten:'Take it. This legacy is yours now.'

text: 守门人关闭了。神殿安静下来。
tags: #texten:The Gatekeeper shut down. The temple fell silent.

text: 我们走。我带你离开这里。离开了你就会好的。
column6: #texten:We're leaving. I'll carry you out. You'll be fine once we're out.
#texten:Take all the notes back for me.

text: 还有那个理论……相对论。让大家知道时间的真相。
column6: #texten:And that theory... relativity. Let everyone know the truth about time.

text: 这样以后就不会有人像我一样，走了几年却错过了几十年。
column6: #texten:So no one else will ever leave for a few years and miss a few decades.
#texten:_99[k]r, thank you for coming to find me.

text: 我写'不用找我'的时候……其实特别希望你来。
column6: #texten:When I wrote 'don't come looking for me'... I was really hoping you would.

text: _99[k]r带着所有的笔记、人类的遗产和相对论的知识，踏上了回西格纳鲁的归途。
tags: #texten:_99[k]r carried all the notes, humanity's legacy, and the knowledge of relativity on the journey back to Signalru.
#texten:And the path a friend once walked.

text: 身后，数字神殿熄灭了最后一盏灯。
tags: #texten:Behind — the digital temple extinguished its final light.
